test:frontend.notes: 2 failed test suites (dashboard.test.tsx, onboarding.test.tsx) due to ReferenceError with vi.mock next-intl. 1 test file passed (auth.test.ts). These are test configuration issues with vitest mocking, not code bugs.

lint:frontend.notes: Lint passed with only warnings (no-img-element, unused-vars, no-explicit-any). No blocking issues.

typecheck:frontend.notes: TypeScript type check passed with no errors.

test:backend.notes: 56 failed, 87 passed, 12 errors. Main issues: (1) KeyError 'access_token'/'refresh_token' in auth-related tests - response format issue. (2) SQLAlchemy relationship errors (AmbiguousForeignKeysError, InvalidRequestError) in notification and community tests - model relationship issues. (3) Many tests failing with 500 status instead of expected codes.

blockingIssues.description: All subscription module code is UNTRACKED in git. Entire implementation (backend: router.py, models.py, schemas.py, service.py, repository.py; frontend: pricing/page.tsx, PremiumGate.tsx, subscriptions.ts) consists of untracked files that will be lost on git operations.
Server-side premium endpoint gating NOT implemented. The require_premium_access dependency exists but is not used by ANY API endpoint. Premium content is not protected by 403 responses.
No tests created for subscription module despite backend-worker skill requiring TDD. No test_subscriptions.py exists in apps/api/tests/.
Expected behavior 'Renewal reminder: notification sent 3 days before expiry' is NOT implemented. No notification logic or background task exists.
deleteDiscussion is imported but does not exist in the API client. Will cause runtime error when trying to delete a discussion.
currentUserRole state is never populated. fetchCurrentUser() only returns user ID, not role. Moderator UI never displays.
Report button has no onClick handler. Users cannot report inappropriate content.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit requirement that all new feature code must be committed to git before marking feature as complete. Untracked files should be treated as incomplete.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: subscription-module has all code untracked. Features cannot be considered complete if they're not version controlled.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify TDD requirement - verify test files exist, not just that curl/agent-browser verification was done.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: subscription-module marked complete but has no test file despite TDD skill requirement.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add requirement for server-side premium gating to be implemented and tested for any subscription feature.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: subscription-module has require_premium_access dependency but it's not applied to any endpoints.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add rule: API client functions must be verified to exist before importing in components.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: community-module imports deleteDiscussion but only delete_discussion exists in API client.
